title: Logs command renders errors log entries
description: Black-box smoke for `orca logs errors` with a preseeded errors log file.
input: Create an `errors.log` file under an isolated ORCA_HOME, run `orca logs errors`, and verify the command renders the error log path and entry text.
command:
bash -lc 'REPO_ROOT=${PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}; cd "$REPO_ROOT"; bash agent-eval/scripts/prepare-fast-gate.sh >/dev/null; TMP_ROOT=$(mktemp -d); trap "rm -rf $TMP_ROOT" EXIT; mkdir -p "$TMP_ROOT/home/.orca/logs"; cat > "$TMP_ROOT/home/.orca/logs/errors.log" <<EOF
[ERROR] boom from black-box logs
EOF
env -i PATH="$PATH" HOME="$TMP_ROOT/home" ORCA_HOME="$TMP_ROOT/home/.orca" node dist/bin/orca.js logs errors'
